LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER JOHN BERTOLDI, INCORPORATED'S MOTION FOR RELEASE OF STOP NOTICE FUNDS PURSUANT TO CIVIL CODE SEC 9400 ET SEQ. IS CONTINUED TO DECEMBER 9, 2013 TO GIVE PLAINTIFF AND THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. PLAINTIFF MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE NOTICE OF FILING OF PLEADINGS, THAT CONSIST OF THE AFFIDAVIT AND COUNTERAFFIDAVIT, AND THE LETTER DATED SEPTEMBER 23, 2013 FROM THE BOARD OF TRUSTEES OF SAN FRANCISCO COMMUNITY COLLEGE DISTRICT TO THE CLERK OF THE COURT TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN NOVEMBER 19, 2013 AT 4:00 PM OR THE MOTION WILL BE DENIED. THESE DOCUMENTS ARE NOT SCANNED ON THE COURT'S REGISTER OF ACTIONS. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CRC 3.1110(F). THE COURT HAS COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING, OPPOSITION AND REPLY PAPERS. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN, CSR #6185

Ntc Of Motion And Motion For Release Of Stop Notice Funds Pursuant To Civil Code Sec 9400 Et Seq.
Off Calendar Nov-19-2013 Continued To Dec-09-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER JOHN BERTOLDI, INCORPORATED'S Motion For Release Of Stop Notice Funds Pursuant To Civil Code Sec 9400 Et Seq. IS Continued to December 9, 2013 to give Plaintiff and the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Plaintiff must deliver courtesy copies of the Notice of Filing of Pleadings, that consist of the affidavit and counteraffidavit, and the letter dated September 23, 2013 from the Board of Trustees of San Francisco Community College District to the Clerk of the Court to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than November 19, 2013 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. These documents are not scanned on the Court's Register of Actions. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). The court has courtesy copies of the moving, opposition and reply papers. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR #6185
